field.name: product_properties_definition
field.eval: [{'name': 'dab0980f9666c1ec', 'type': 'separator', 'string': ' Artwork Information'}, {'name': '9a7f0558dfa83ac7', 'type': 'char', 'string': 'Internal Reference\t', 'default': False}, {'name': '5ca407c834ac9d33', 'type': 'char', 'string': 'Artist', 'default': False}, {'name': '1d6b2217aaed94ee', 'type': 'char', 'string': 'Medium', 'default': False, 'view_in_cards': True}, {'name': '3588aec5e9b5ac55', 'type': 'char', 'string': 'Types', 'default': False}, {'name': 'd9771d83dc2a76b5', 'type': 'char', 'string': 'Creation Date', 'default': False, 'view_in_cards': False}, {'name': 'b56050e7e68c90d0', 'tags': [['contemporary', 'Contemporary', 4], ['abstract', 'Abstract', 5], ['landscape', 'Landscape', 6], ['minimalism', 'Minimalism', 7], ['monochrome', 'Monochrome', 8], ['expressionism', 'Expressionism', 9], ['memory', 'Memory', 10], ['interactive', 'Interactive', 11], ['light', 'Light', 1], ['technology', 'Technology', 2]], 'type': 'tags', 'string': 'Tags', 'default': False}, {'name': 'e4f6534b87736269', 'type': 'separator', 'string': 'Acquisition & Ownership'}, {'name': '9c1fdb23f80cd5a3', 'type': 'selection', 'string': 'Owner Type', 'default': False, 'selection': [['5543dce5b5c64b05', 'Museum'], ['ead5ccb0f452df44', 'Artist'], ['50dd55264783ab07', 'Foundation'], ['7cfb3e61af7d7220', 'Private Lender'], ['51486437e48d7657', 'Donor']]}, {'name': 'b79d74a019e79c75', 'type': 'many2one', 'domain': False, 'string': 'Owner', 'comodel': 'res.partner', 'default': False}, {'name': '5c8711e41c349586', 'type': 'selection', 'string': 'Acquisition Type', 'default': False, 'selection': [['8fa30420e71aad83', 'Purchased'], ['b308e8ccc233a63d', 'Donated'], ['00f580a3119a6ec7', 'On Loan']]}, {'name': '3cbb72aa7bed5a43', 'type': 'date', 'string': 'Arrival Date', 'default': False}, {'name': 'c04e0b2a90bf234b', 'type': 'date', 'string': 'Return Date', 'default': False}, {'name': '65bc72d6f5e512f7', 'type': 'many2one', 'domain': False, 'string': 'Location', 'comodel': 'stock.location', 'default': False}, {'name': '2f0c88453da4224e', 'type': 'separator', 'string': 'Dimensions '}, {'name': 'eebdc0a7cbd42069', 'type': 'float', 'string': 'Height (cm)', 'default': 0}, {'name': '0e647c119ca24487', 'type': 'float', 'string': 'Width (cm)', 'default': 0}, {'name': 'dbd300c2d88236b1', 'type': 'float', 'string': 'Depth (cm)', 'default': 0}, {'name':
